cobolLens.copyFolders.description: Folders to search for copybooks (relative to the workspace root)
cobolLens.copyExtensions.description: Extensions to try when resolving copybooks (empty string = no extension)
cobolLens.programFolders.description: Folders (relative to the workspace root) searched to resolve programs called via CALL (empty string = workspace root)
cobolLens.programExtensions.description: Extensions to try when resolving called programs (empty string = no extension)
cobolLens.ignoredCopybooks.description: List of copybooks to exclude from the blocking diagnostic on unresolved COPY statements
cobolLens.language.description: Language for linter diagnostic messages (auto = detect from VS Code locale)
cobolLens.language.auto: Detect from VS Code display language
cobolLens.ifBlockHighlight.enabled.descr: Highlight IF/ELSE/END-IF blocks with different colors per nesting level
cobolLens.ifBlockHighlight.scopeBars.des: Show colored side bars to indicate the scope of each IF block
cobolLens.syntaxHighlighting.enabled.des: Enable/disable the semantic coloring of variables, paragraphs and copybooks (the base syntax highlighting stays active)
cobolLens.showWelcomeOnStartup.descripti: Show the 'Get Started with COBOL Lens' walkthrough once, the first time the extension is installed. It is never shown again afterwards. You can always reopen it from 'Help > Welcome'.
cobolLens.sourceFormat.description: Source format of the COBOL code. Controls the column rulers: rulers at columns 6 and 7 are always shown; 'fixed' also shows the ruler at column 72/73 (the code-area boundary), 'variable' and 'free' do not.
cobolLens.sourceFormat.fixed: Fixed format (columns 1-6 sequence, 7 indicator, 8-72 code, 73+ identification) -- shows the ruler at column 72/73
cobolLens.codeActions.enabled.descriptio: Enable/disable Quick Fixes (light bulb) for linter diagnostics: add END-xxx, add trailing period, convert to UPPERCASE, add GOBACK, add level number.
cobolLens.rename.enabled.description: Enable/disable symbol rename (F2) for variables, paragraphs and sections.
cobolLens.rename.includeCopybooks.descri: When renaming a symbol defined in a copybook, also rename it inside the copybook file. WARNING: copybooks are shared across programs, so this also affects every other program that includes the same copybook. Off by default.
cobolLens.completion.enabled.description: Enable code completion (IntelliSense) for COBOL symbols and keywords. On by default.
cobolLens.completion.variables.descripti: Suggest data item (variable) names defined in the current program. On by default.
cobolLens.completion.paragraphs.descript: Suggest paragraph and section names, prioritized after PERFORM / GO TO. On by default.
cobolLens.completion.keywords.descriptio: Suggest common COBOL verbs and keywords. On by default.
cobolLens.workspaceSymbols.enabled.descr: Enable 'Go to Symbol in Workspace' (Ctrl+T) to search variables, paragraphs and sections across every COBOL file in the workspace. On by default.
cobolLens.codeLens.enabled.description: Show a reference count (CodeLens) above each paragraph and section definition; click it to peek the references. Off by default.
cobolLens.callHierarchy.enabled.descript: Enable Call Hierarchy (Show Call Hierarchy) for paragraphs and sections, tracking PERFORM and GO TO relationships within the file. On by default.
cobolLens.documentHighlight.enabled.desc: Highlight every occurrence of the symbol under the cursor in the current file. On by default.
cobolLens.signatureHelp.enabled.descript: Show parameter hints (Signature Help) for COBOL intrinsic functions while typing FUNCTION calls. On by default.
cobolLens.format.enabled.description: Enable the fixed-format formatter (Format Document / Format Selection): DIVISION/SECTION/paragraphs and 01/77 levels in Area A (col 8), 3-space hierarchical indentation for data and PROCEDURE blocks, exactly one space between level number and name, and trailing-space trimming. Comments and the identification area (col 73+) are left untouched. Off by default.
cobolLens.inlayHints.enabled.description: Show inlay hints with the byte position (1-based, from the start of the 01 record) and the size in bytes of each DATA DIVISION field, computed from its PICTURE/USAGE/OCCURS. On by default.
cobolLens.inlayHints.display.description: Where to show the field byte position and size: 'inline' as inlay hints at the end of the line (default), or 'hover' inside the symbol hover tooltip (less intrusive).
cobolLens.inlayHints.display.inline.desc: Show the information as inlay hints at the end of the line (default).
cobolLens.inlayHints.display.hover.descr: Show the information only inside the symbol hover tooltip (less intrusive).
cobolLens.recordLayout.enabled.descripti: Enable the 'COBOL Lens: Show Record Layout' command, which opens a panel listing each DATA DIVISION record with the byte start/end offset and size of every field. Off by default.
cobolLens.snippets.enabled.description: Provide COBOL code snippets (IF, EVALUATE, PERFORM, CALL, parametric PIC clauses, program skeleton, etc.) as completion items. On by default.
cobolLens.command.showRecordLayout.title: Show Record Layout
cobolLens.command.formatDocument.title: COBOL Lens: Format Document
cobolLens.command.formatSelection.title: COBOL Lens: Format Selection
cobolLens.command.toggleComment.title: COBOL Lens: Toggle Comment
cobolLens.walkthrough.title: Get Started with COBOL Lens
cobolLens.walkthrough.description: Navigate, lint and understand COBOL -- no compiler or language server required.
cobolLens.walkthrough.welcome.title: Why COBOL Lens
cobolLens.walkthrough.welcome.descriptio: A fully standalone COBOL toolkit that runs entirely on your machine -- no compiler, no language server, no network.
cobolLens.walkthrough.navigation.title: Navigate symbols and copybooks
cobolLens.walkthrough.navigation.descrip: Go to Definition, Find References, Rename and workspace search -- even through nested COPY ... REPLACING.
cobolLens.walkthrough.layout.title: See the byte layout -- without a compiler
cobolLens.walkthrough.layout.description: Field size on hover, byte positions as inlay hints, and a full Record Layout panel computed from PIC/USAGE/OCCURS.
cobolLens.walkthrough.linter.title: Catch issues as you type
cobolLens.walkthrough.linter.description: A real-time linter with 47 configurable rules and one-click Quick Fixes.
cobolLens.walkthrough.ifblocks.title: Read nested logic at a glance
cobolLens.walkthrough.ifblocks.descripti: Highlight matching IF/ELSE/END-IF blocks with scope bars for up to 9 nesting levels.
cobolLens.walkthrough.completion.title: Write COBOL faster
cobolLens.walkthrough.completion.descrip: Context-aware completion, copybook autocomplete and ready-made snippets.
cobolLens.walkthrough.configure.title: Make it yours
cobolLens.walkthrough.configure.descript: Point the extension at your copybook folders, pick your source format and toggle any feature.
cobolLens.linter.onType.description: Run the linter in real time while typing (if false, only on save)
cobolLens.linter.delay.description: Delay in milliseconds before running the linter after a change
cobolLens.linter.suppressions.enabled.de: Enable inline suppression comments (cobol-lens-disable, cobol-lens-disable-line, cobol-lens-disable-next-line, cobol-lens-enable) and the related Quick Fixes
cobolLens.linter.rules.no-goto.enabled.d: Advise against GO TO (prefer PERFORM and IF/EVALUATE for clearer control flow)
cobolLens.linter.rules.no-at-end.enabled: Do not use AT END / NOT AT END, use the file status with EVALUATE
cobolLens.linter.rules.no-level-77-78.en: Do not use levels 77 and 78 in WORKING-STORAGE
cobolLens.linter.rules.division-separato: Each DIVISION/SECTION must be preceded by the separator line
cobolLens.linter.rules.pic-alignment.ena: The PIC definition must start at position 45
cobolLens.linter.rules.select-col12.enab: SELECT in FILE-CONTROL must start at column 12
cobolLens.linter.rules.assign-col29.enab: ASSIGN TO, ORGANIZATION, etc. must start at column 29
Paragraphs must follow the I0001-/E0001-/F0001-/V0000-/S0000- convention
cobolLens.linter.rules.no-else-if.enable: Do not use ELSE IF, indent the IF inside an ELSE
cobolLens.linter.rules.move-to-alignment: In the MOVE...TO statement, the word TO must start at position 45
There must be exactly 1 space between the level and the variable name
cobolLens.linter.rules.end-structure.ena: Each IF/PERFORM/EVALUATE must have the corresponding END- closure
cobolLens.linter.rules.undefined-variabl: Verify that used variables are defined in the program or in the copybooks
cobolLens.linter.rules.undefined-paragra: Verify that each PERFORM refers to a defined paragraph
Report paragraphs that are defined but never called
cobolLens.linter.rules.unused-variable.e: Report variables defined in WORKING-STORAGE but never used
cobolLens.linter.rules.duplicate-variabl: Verify that no variables are defined more than once
cobolLens.linter.rules.missing-period.en: Verify that variable definitions end with a period
cobolLens.linter.rules.pic-missing.enabl: Verify that elementary variables have the PIC clause
cobolLens.linter.rules.mismatched-copy.e: Verify that COPY statements refer to existing files
cobolLens.linter.rules.perform-thru-orde: Verify that in PERFORM X THRU Y, Y is defined after X
cobolLens.linter.rules.section-order.ena: Verify that the DIVISIONs are in the required order
cobolLens.linter.rules.empty-paragraph.e: Report empty paragraphs or paragraphs that only contain EXIT/CONTINUE
cobolLens.linter.rules.consecutive-perfo: Verify that there is a blank line between two consecutive PERFORMs
cobolLens.linter.rules.missing-file-stat: Verify that each SELECT has a STATUS clause
Verify that the program contains STOP RUN or GOBACK
cobolLens.linter.rules.and-or-if.enabled: Report a spurious IF after AND/OR in a compound condition
cobolLens.linter.rules.redefines-size.en: Verify that REDEFINES has the same size as the original element
Verify that column 7 contains only valid indicator characters (space, *, /, D, -, $)
cobolLens.linter.rules.unsubscripted-occ: Report variables with OCCURS used without an index or subscript
cobolLens.linter.rules.orphan-scope-deli: Report END-IF/END-PERFORM/END-EVALUATE without the corresponding opening statement
cobolLens.linter.rules.variable-name-len: The variable name must not exceed 30 characters (Micro Focus COBOL limit)
cobolLens.linter.rules.missing-level.ena: Variable in the DATA DIVISION declared without a level number
cobolLens.linter.rules.chars-after-perio: Invalid content after the terminator period of a COBOL statement
cobolLens.linter.rules.compute-multiline: Multiline COMPUTE with a line ending in '*': the CICS precompiler may generate errors
cobolLens.linter.rules.alphanumeric-in-c: Alphanumeric variable used in a math statement (COMPUTE/ADD/SUBTRACT/MULTIPLY/DIVIDE)
cobolLens.linter.rules.move-alphanumeric: Alphanumeric value (literal, figurative constant or alphanumeric variable) moved into a numeric variable; FUNCTION NUMVAL is excluded
cobolLens.linter.rules.duplicate-paragra: Two paragraphs with the same name in the same section (makes PERFORM ambiguous)
cobolLens.linter.rules.alter-statement.e: Use of the ALTER statement (changes a GO TO target at runtime, hard to maintain)
cobolLens.linter.rules.next-sentence.ena: Use of NEXT SENTENCE (deprecated and fragile; use CONTINUE instead)
cobolLens.linter.rules.evaluate-without-: EVALUATE closed by END-EVALUATE without a WHEN OTHER default branch
cobolLens.linter.rules.perform-varying-w: PERFORM VARYING without an UNTIL clause (risk of an infinite loop)
cobolLens.linter.rules.level-88-without-: Level 88 condition-name not subordinate to any parent data item
cobolLens.linter.rules.move-truncation.e: MOVE into a destination with a smaller PIC (silent truncation); compares pure alphanumeric or numeric elementary items only
